description_long: This object is a slender, upright potted plant with a single central stem and several pairs of broad, serrated green leaves arranged alternately along its length. The leaves are vibrant and healthy, with a slightly glossy surface and prominent veins. The stem is dark brown and appears woody, providing sturdy support for the foliage. There is no visible pot or container in the images, suggesting the focus is solely on the plant itself. The plant has a fresh, natural appearance, typical of a young herb or decorative houseplant. No decorative elements, labels, or additional features are visible.
description: A tall, slender potted plant with a central woody stem and pairs of broad, serrated green leaves. The plant appears healthy and vibrant, with no visible pot or decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central stem and alternating pairs of broad green leaves, with the leaves slightly angled to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the leaves, which appear more layered and overlapping from this angle.
description_view_2: Rear view with the stem and leaves visible, similar to the front but with the leaves angled to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the leaves' profile and their arrangement along the stem, with less overlap than view 1.
